title: Amazon Linux 2023 - ALAS2023-2026-1796: Medium priority package update for perl-Crypt-PasswdMD5
description:
Package updates are available for Amazon Linux 2023 that fix the following vulnerabilities:
CVE-2026-6659:
	Crypt::PasswdMD5 versions through 1.42 for Perl generates insecure random values for salts.

The built-in rand function is predictable, and unsuitable for cryptography.
